Curriculum Vitae

Education, experience, fellowships, and skills

Download PDF
Education
August 2020 – Present
Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics
Indian Institute of Space Science and Technology (IIST), Trivandrum
Research Area: Markov Fluid Vacation Queueing Models and their Applications in Renewable-Powered Systems
Supervisor: Prof. T. G. Deepak
June 2014 – June 2016
Master of Science in Mathematics
National Institute of Technology Calicut
Dissertation: Stochastic Inventory Models for Inventory Management  ·  GPA: 3.23
June 2011 – May 2014
Bachelor of Science in Mathematics
University of Calicut
GPA: 3.56
Experience
June 2016 – March 2020
Lecturer
LBS Centre for Science and Technology
Taught undergraduate and postgraduate mathematics courses including Calculus, Linear Algebra, Probability Theory, and Numerical Methods for engineering and science students. Designed course materials, conducted tutorials, and evaluated assessments across multiple academic programmes.
